name: St. Thomas Aquinas High School
message: St. Thomas Aquinas High School (founded in 1936) is a private, Roman Catholic, college-preparatory high school in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. The school currently enrolls 2,420 students on its 25-acre (100,000 m2) campus. Saint Thomas Aquinas High School corporate office is located in 2801 SW 12th St, Fort Lauderdale, Florida, 33312, United States and has 257 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 103.8 GB
